title: More products with Jif peanut butter recalled over salmonella concerns
text: Several companies have recalled products that contain Jif peanut butter amid an outbreak of salmonella infections.

title: The maker of Jif peanut butter has recalled dozens of products over possible salmonella contamination — see the full list
text: The FDA says consumers should examine any Jif peanut butter products in their homes and avoid eating or serving them.

title: Smucker (SJM) Stock Dips on Jif Peanut Butter Recall
text: J M Smucker (SJM) stock is falling on Monday after the food company announced a recall of Jif peanut butter due to a Salmonella outbreak. The post Smucker (SJM) Stock Dips on Jif Peanut Butter Recall appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: J.M. Smucker is recalling some Jif peanut butter products due to salmonella
text: J.M. Smucker is recalling certain types of Jif peanut butter in the US because of a potential salmonella contamination.

title: The J.M. Smucker Co. to Report Fourth Quarter Earnings
text: ORRVILLE, Ohio , May 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) will report its fourth quarter fiscal 2022 financial results on Tuesday, June 7, 2022.

title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Gains on Demand Amid Cost Hurdles
text: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) has been gaining on the revival in away from home demand and its focus on core priorities, while cost headwinds have been a concern.
